title: 皐月賞の後に・春先の奇跡！

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Huh... I actually won? No way... I won the Satsuki
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
People said that it couldn't be done, yet I
somehow managed to pull it off...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer? What kind of magic spell did you
cast on me?
choice_data_list: I just did everything I could.
I just did everything I could.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever it is you did, it helped me run a
great race despite my health issues.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy! Can I pat your head as a reward?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Coddling you at the Classics is all I've been
dreaming of! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You were so impressive that I can't see you as just
"cute" anymore.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Calling you a good trainer doesn't seem
appropriate for an achievement this grand. Can I
praise you in a different way?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Okay, here I go... Nice and loud!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Who's an amazing trainer?! You're an amazing
trainer! Yes, you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She praises me with the incredibly rare "amazing
trainer" compliment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek miraculously conquers the Satsuki
Sho! Congratulations!
